source_jobs.title: GTM - Intern (Operations & Automation)
source_jobs.description:
comstruct ist die digitale Plattform für die Materialbeschaffung im Bauwesen.
Unsere Mission: Wir bringen eine der am wenigsten digitalisierten Branchen – das Baugewerbe – ins 21. Jahrhundert. Dafür brauchen wir engagierte Talente, die Lust haben, früh Verantwortung zu übernehmen und mit uns eine Branche nachhaltig zu verändern.


Als GTM - Intern (Operations & Automation) unterstützt du unser Operations-Team bei der Anbindung neuer Lieferanten. Du bist täglich im Kontakt mit den Lieferanten unserer Kunden, hilfst bei der Datenerhebung und sorgst dafür, dass alles reibungslos und effizient auf unserer Plattform abläuft. Dabei sammelst du wertvolle Einblicke in ein schnell wachsendes B2B-Tech-Startup.


Wir sind ein hybrides Unternehmen mit Büro in München und freuen uns, wenn du während deines Praktikums regelmäßig vor Ort bist (ca. 3 Tage pro Woche).


Deine Aufgaben 🏗️

 - Du kontaktierst neue Lieferanten: Du bist verantwortlich für den Erstkontakt zu Lieferanten – telefonisch oder per E-Mail – und erklärst ihnen, wie die Zusammenarbeit mit comstruct funktioniert.

 - Du sammelst Daten: Du hilfst dabei, die wichtigsten Informationen und Dokumente (z. B. Musterlieferscheine, Stammdaten) von den Lieferanten einzuholen und strukturiert zu erfassen.

 - Du unterstützt bei der Anbindung & lernst die Technik kennen: Gemeinsam mit dem Team begleitest du den Integrationsprozess der Lieferanten. Dabei erhältst du Einblicke in den technischen Part unserer Anwendung, z.B. wie E-Mail-Integrationen aufgesetzt werden oder APIs funktionieren (keine Programmierkenntnisse nötig, aber Interesse an digitalen Tools ist hilfreich).

 - Du treibst die Skalierung mit voran: Du unterstützt uns dabei, das Department auf skalierbare Beine zu stellen. Du hilfst, manuelle Arbeit durch Automatisierung und KI-gestützten Outreach zu verringern und treibst hier auch kleine, eigene Projekte voran.

 - Du arbeitest mit verschiedenen Teams zusammen: Du bist Teil eines motivierten Teams, das eng mit Customer Success und Product zusammenarbeitet, um unsere Plattform laufend zu verbessern.

 - Du bringst dich ein: Du bekommst Raum, deine Ideen einzubringen, Prozesse mitzugestalten und Verantwortung zu übernehmen – je nach Dauer und Verlauf des Praktikums.

Dein Profil ✨

 - Du hast bereits ein Studium in Betriebswirtschaft, Volkswirtschaft oder einem vergleichbaren Fach abgeschlossen oder befindest dich aktuell darin. Auch Gap-Year-Studierende sind herzlich willkommen.

 - Du hast Lust auf praktische Erfahrung in einem Tech-Startup und möchtest Einblicke in den Alltag von Operations, Customer Success und Produktintegration bekommen.

 - Du telefonierst gerne, kommunizierst klar und professionell auf Deutsch (C2-Niveau) – freundlich, verbindlich und überzeugend.

 - Du arbeitest strukturiert und eigenständig, bleibst auch bei mehreren Aufgaben organisiert und denkst mit.

 - Du hast Interesse an digitalen Prozessen und scheust dich nicht vor CRM-Tools.

 - Du bist neugierig, hands-on und möchtest etwas bewegen.

Warum comstruct 🪴

 - Startup-Spirit mit Verantwortung ab dem ersten Tag

 - Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit einem erfahrenen Team

 - Persönliches Onboarding und Mentoring während deines Praktikums

 - Zentral gelegenes Büro in München mit Snacks, Getränken & gemeinsamen Abendessen

 - Wellpass-Abo & regelmäßige Teamevents

 - Möglichkeit zur Übernahme als Werkstudent:in oder in Festanstellung nach dem Praktikum

Über comstruct
comstruct ist ein schnell wachsendes Construction-Tech-Startup mit Sitz in München. Unsere Plattform digitalisiert die Materialbeschaffung auf dem Bau – effizient, transparent und datenbasiert. Gegründet im März 2022, unterstützen wir bereits neun der zehn größten Bauunternehmen der Schweiz und bauen mit 12,5 Mio. € Finanzierung von Google Ventures & 20VC die Dateninfrastruktur für die europäische Bauwirtschaft.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
comstruct is building the agentic workforce for procurement in European construction. Our agents turn paper delivery notes, fragmented invoices and offline supplier decisions into structured, real-time data and live decisions, embedded inside the largest contractors in Europe and the US.

We recently secured a €12.5M seed financing round from prestigious VCs, including 20VC and Google Ventures, along with top European investors.

We are looking for a talented and driven full-time Senior Software Engineer to join our Core team. You’ll play a pivotal role in expanding and scaling our Integrations platform, and help it morph into comstruct’s Data Processing system.

This means expanding our scope to own the ingestion, processing, and integration of all critical data, including invoices and external ERP systems.

You will be a key technical leader in this transformation. Your first major project will be to help design and lead the rewrite of our delivery note ingestion pipeline, moving us to a modern, asynchronous, queue-based architecture that can scale with our ambitions.

As a hybrid company, we value in-person collaboration and expect employees to work from our Munich office 3 days a week.

What you will do 🏗️

 - Lead systems design: Drive the technical design and implementation of our new, asynchronous data processing platform.

 - Build data pipelines: Develop and scale the systems that ingest and process data from diverse sources (emails, APIs, portals) and integrate with external systems (ERPs).

 - Own data extraction: Take ownership of our data extraction services, including our existing LLM-based solutions, and help improve and scale them.

 - Expand team ownership: Help the team take on new responsibilities, such as invoice processing and ownership of our public API, to create a unified approach to data processing.

 - Provide technical leadership: Act as a senior technical voice on the team. You'll contribute to high-quality design, provide insightful code reviews, and informally mentor other engineers.

 - Improve existing systems: Assess and improve the architecture, reliability, and performance of our current integration services.

What you need to succeed ✨

 - Experience: 5+ years of professional experience building and maintaining complex, mission-critical software products.

 - Strong Engineering Fundamentals: Proven experience in a modern, high-level programming language (e.g., Python, Kotlin, TypeScript, Java, C#). We prioritize strong software engineering fundamentals, systems design skills, and the ability to learn over deep knowledge of one specific language.

 - Mindset: A self-driven and proactive attitude. You are comfortable navigating ambiguity and can take complex problems from concept to solution.

 - Environment: Experience working in a startup or a similarly fast-paced product environment.

 - Product Focus: A strong focus on building solutions that solve customer problems.

 - Communication: Fluent in English (German is a plus).

Nice to have:

 - Asynchronous Systems: Experience designing and building message-driven, queue-based systems (e.g., Google Cloud Pub/Sub, RabbitMQ).

 - Cloud Infrastructure: Experience with cloud platforms, preferably GCP (AWS or Azure is also valuable).

 - Data & ML: Interest or experience in data-intensive applications, data extraction, or applying LLMs.

 - Web Scraping: Familiarity with web scraping tools and techniques (e.g., Selenium).

 - API Design: Experience building and maintaining public-facing APIs.

📚 How are we setting you up for success

 - Shape your career path: We give you the freedom to own your work and build something from the ground up

 - Support and mentoring from our engineering mentors via our network with Google Ventures and 20VC, early access to latest LLMs and SDKs for experimentation

 - Own a piece of the pie: We offer equity options so you're a true owner, sharing directly in the success you help create on top of a competitive salary

source_jobs.title: GTM Associate
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION:

comstruct is building the agentic workforce for procurement in European construction. Our agents turn paper delivery notes, fragmented invoices and offline supplier decisions into structured, real-time data and live decisions, embedded inside the largest contractors in Europe and the US. To accelerate this journey, we secured a €12.5M seed financing round from 20VC and Google Ventures, along with top European investors.




THE ROLE:

As a GTM Associate, you play a mission-critical role in the growth of comstruct. You are the main driver of your segment and therefore a key contributor to our overall revenue success. As the first point of contact for potential customers, you set the foundation for high-quality deals and long-term customer relationships.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - You are the engine that keeps comstruct growing. Without pipeline there are no deals, no customers, no company. This is your responsibility.

 - Leverage AI agents, automations, and creative strategies to reach prospects nobody else has found yet.

 - You identify new markets, develop your own approach and execute it. No playbook handed to you. The market is yours to open.




TOPICS YOU WILL BE WORKING ON:

Hunt the Market

Getting into a market is one thing. Your job is to make sure we leave no contractor behind - find every qualified buyer in our existing markets before anyone else gets there.

Market Development

You will identify which segments, regions, and buyer types to go after next, build your own strategy and execute it. Your goal is to open markets that did not exist in our pipeline before you touched them.

Agentic Outreach

You don’t just use AI tools, you build with them. You’ll design and run your own outreach sequences powered by AI agents and automations from scratch, no one hands you a system.




WHAT SUCCESS IN THE FIRST 3 MONTHS LOOKS LIKE:

 1. 20 qualified meetings booked and every single one a contractor that had never heard of comstruct before you.

 2. You've built a fully automated pipeline machine that generates 300+ new qualified leads per month.

 3. A new market mapped, key decision makers identified and a clear path to the first deal laid out.


WHO YOU ARE:

 - You’ve excelled among your peers and have the examples to prove it: academics, sports, side projects, anything that shows you go above and beyond

 - You are genuinely curious and exploratory - ready to build the next venture

 - You constantly want to raise the bar, are eager to learn and value feedback

 - 5 days present in the office in Munich

 - Fluent in German and English


WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Salary: €65-90k OTE and equity options

 - Career development (GTM-Lead & AE) opportunities in one of the fastest growing start ups in Europe

 - A high performance culture where every department delivers excellence

 - A market that is unsaturated and largely undigitized, which presents a great opportunity to win and lead the market

 - Direct mentorship from our Co-founder & CEO, Henric Meinhardt

 - Regular feedback sessions with experienced mentors like Johann Butting (Vice President of Slack)

 - Perks:
   
   - Team offsites - our last two were in Mallorca and Italy. The next one is in Porto in August.
   
   - Free drinks, snacks, and daily optional dinners
   
   - Wellpass subscription
   
   - Voluntary pension contribution
   
   - Dog-friendly office

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to Franz https://de.linkedin.com/in/franz-kremers.

source_jobs.title: Intern to the Chief of Staff
source_jobs.description:
comstruct automates construction companies’ commercial processes by extracting material data from delivery notes and invoices. After our €12.5M funding round including investors such as Google Ventures and 20VC, we are now looking for extremely driven and ambitious individuals who want to bring comstruct to the next level of success. Whilst we are excited to name some of the world’s biggest construction companies as our customers (such as Vinci) we’re just getting started.

As part of our growth, we are looking for an Intern to the Chief of Staff to join the G&A team.

This job is a unique opportunity to learn how to operate a startup - from Finance to Talent, GTM & operations.



🚀 What we are looking for:

 - Recent graduation from one of the world's top universities

 - You have completed internships in top investment banks, leading startups or Tier 1 consultancies

 - You have experience in (financial) modeling, building automations and developing sales processes

 - You are extremely driven and have a track record to prove that, as we expect a very high level of structure and ownership from you

 - Full proficiency in German (C2) and English

 - Please note that this role requires a high level of office presence

 - Nice to have: You just finished your studies and are looking for a 6 month internship with opportunity to join full-time.



🚀 What you will be working on:

 - GTM & Operations: Support the structure of our international expansion. You will work on central topics across our commercial departments to multiply our revenue.

 - Talent: We need to find the best talent there is to build a world-class organization. In close cooperation with the comstruct leadership you will source some of the most relevant positions.

 - Finance: You will own central processes including cost management and accounting.



📚 How are we setting you up for success:

 - Our co-founder and CEO Henric Meinhardt will personally make sure that your personal development is well taken care of

 - A very clear path to success. Your career is important to us and we want you to succeed.

 - Regular feedback session with your mentor to help you get the most out of the program

 - And of course top notch hardware, wellpass subscriptions and yearly offsites (the last ones were in Mallorca and Italy).

source_jobs.title: GTM - Intern (Sales)
source_jobs.description:
comstruct automates construction companies’ commercial processes by extracting material data from delivery notes and invoices at the item level, enabling automated documentation, invoice entry, reconciliation, and workflows. We're looking for exceptional talent to help us empower the industry with smarter, more efficient solutions.

Join comstruct’s Go to Market team and help shape how we bring innovation to one of the world’s largest industries, construction. As a GTM Intern, you’ll be at the heart of our sales engine, turning data, creativity and persistence into real customer impact.

As a hybrid company, we value in-person collaboration and expect employees to work from our Munich office 3 days a week.

What you will be building 🏗️

 - Cultivate and nurture relationships with B2B prospects from the construction industry by proactively reaching out to generate interest and schedule discovery calls

 - Utilize multiple channels (LinkedIn, email, phone) to identify potential customers, build outreach campaigns and create engagement with key decision-makers

 - Support comstruct’s Go-to-Market initiatives by researching new customer segments, analyzing target markets and helping to refine our sales strategy

 - Collaborate with the GTM team to track results, improve CRM data quality and optimize our lead generation processes

 - Stay informed about industry trends, competitors and digitalization initiatives within the construction space

What you need to succeed ✨

 - Passion for B2B software sales and a strong interest in startups, SaaS and digital transformation

 - Proactive and curious mindset, eager to learn how Go-to-Market and Sales strategies work in fast-scaling companies

 - Analytical and structured working style, combined with strong attention to detail

 - Excellent communication skills in German (C2 required) and English. You enjoy connecting with people and explaining complex topics simply

 - Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g. HubSpot or Pipedrive), LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Clay is a plus, but not required

 - Team-oriented attitude – you’re motivated to take ownership and contribute to a growing organization

Why us 🪴

To build the technical foundation of such an important industry, we rely on an outstanding team of A-players across all domains. Working together with humble, pragmatic, and output-oriented people who actively pursue their visions guarantees a steep personal as well as professional learning curve.

 - Your sandbox: try things, break things, learn, and level up

 - Freedom to take over responsibility and to shape your own role/career

 - Great leaders invest in their people’s growth while growing alongside the company

 - Individual Development Budgets e.g., for certificates, conferences, or books

 - Take part in our growth! We offer equity options so you share directly in the value you help create

 - Free drinks, snacks and daily optional dinners in the office

 - Regular Team Events, Wellpass subscription, workations, offsites

 - And it doesn’t end here: great tech gear, referral rewards, and yes - dogs are welcome at the office! 🐶

About comstruct

comstruct is a young construction tech startup founded in March 2022. With a team of four co-founders from diverse backgrounds, we are building the data layer for the construction industry. We recently secured a €12.5M seed financing round from prestigious VCs, including 20VC and Google Ventures, along with top European investors. We already serve nine of Switzerland's ten largest contractors as customers, improving the lives of thousands of people in the industry.

Together with YOU, we aim to build a great, diverse team and become the world's leading construction-tech company propelling one of the least digitized industries to the forefront of innovation!

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
comstruct is building the agentic workforce for procurement in European construction. Our agents turn paper delivery notes, fragmented invoices and offline supplier decisions into structured, real-time data and live decisions, embedded inside the largest contractors in Europe and the US.

 

We recently secured a €12.5M seed financing round from prestigious VCs, including 20VC and Google Ventures, along with top European investors.

 

We're looking for Product Engineers who want to own that from end to end. Not just write code but design, build, and ship complete autonomous agents that actually work in the real world, inside some of the most operationally complex companies on the planet.

 

This is what it means to be a Product Engineer at comstruct: you get a problem, you form a hypothesis, and you drive it all the way to a fully working autonomous system. You own the agent logic, the backend, the frontend, the iteration with real customers. From zero to deployed, end to end.

 

As a hybrid company, we value in-person collaboration and expect our team members to be in our Munich office 3 days per week.

 

🚀 What We Are Looking For

 - You have at least 3 years of experience in a high-growth startup or scale-up, and you can point to things you've shipped and truly owned and not just contributed to

 - You care deeply about whether what you build actually solves the problem, and you're comfortable navigating ambiguity to get there

 - What we care about most: you think like a builder. You take ownership seriously. You have the drive and the track record to prove it

 - Full proficiency in German and English.

 

🚀 You have ownership to drive a new product initiatives like:

 - Procurement Agents - fully autonomous systems that handle material orders directly from the construction site, from the first requisition all the way to the posted invoice, with no human action required

 - Contract Management - tools that give construction companies complete, real-time visibility into every active contract across their operations

 - Your own idea - if you see a way to 10x the value of our platform, you have the mandate and the support to go build it

 - Your tech stack: Typescript, NestJS, React, GCP, Hazura, Flutter

 

📚 How are we setting you up for success

 - Shape your career path: We give you the freedom to own your work and build something from the ground up

 - Support and mentoring from our engineering mentors via our network with Google Ventures and 20VC, early access to latest LLMs and SDKs for experimentation

 - Own a piece of the pie: We offer equity options so you're a true owner, sharing directly in the success you help create on top of a competitive salary

 - You'll have a dedicated development budget to invest in your skills, from certificates to conferences so you can grow with the company

 - Relocation support to help you feel at home in Munich

 - And of course top notch hardware, any AI productivity tools you need, daily dinner options, wellpass subscriptions and yearly offsites (the last ones were in Mallorca and Italy).

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)
source_jobs.description:
comstruct turns the paper chaos of construction into structured data. We extract material data from delivery notes and invoices at item level and automate what construction companies still do by hand: documentation, invoice entry, reconciliation. We're looking for exceptional talent to help us empower the industry with smarter and more efficient solutions.



About the role 🦺

As our Forward Deployed Engineer you are the technical face of comstruct - the person who turns a signed deal into a live and working systems for the customer.

Most of your time you're building: scoping ERP and supplier integrations and making data of our customers flow reliably between systems. But you'll also be on construction sites and in customer meetings regularly - onboarding teams, debugging their problems with the goal to drive every project from POV to full rollout and go-live.

You're a builder who'd rather talk to customers and solve real problems on real construction sites than polish code in isolation? Then we should talk.



What you will be building 🏗️

 - Own POV and rollout implementation: You implement the POV that wins the deal and then scale it into the full rollout across construction sites. From first integration to company-wide go-live, you own and implement it.

 - Integrate ERP systems: You connect our product to our customers' ERP systems. You scope the architecture, build the integration and make sure data flows reliably from day one.

 - Integrate suppliers: You bring our customers' suppliers onto the comstruct platform, turning delivery notes and invoices into structured, digital item-level data.

 - Run on-site onboardings: You go out where construction happens. You onboard teams directly on site and make sure comstruct works on the construction site, not just in the demo.
   
   

What we're looking for ✨

 - You bring 1-2 years of hands-on experience in Solution Engineering, Implementation, Product or Software Engineering, with coding and technical problem solving from APIs and scripts to system integrations with React, TypeScript or SQL.

 - You have owned a technical project from start to finish: project plan, scoping, prioritization, implementation, testing and a successful go-live. Multiple parallel projects don't throw you off.

 - You are curious to dig deep into our product. You want to understand how things work under the hood and you naturally connect what customers need with what the product can do.

 - You are a natural communicator. People simply enjoy working with you, and you explain technical topics in a way that everyone in the room and on the construction site understands.

 - You are a structured problem solver with a sharp analytical mind. New systems and complex setups don't intimidate you, you figure them out.

 - You are willing to work five days a week from our Munich office with occasional customer travel.

 - You are native in German and fluent in English.

Nice to have: Ideally, you have initial experience with Construction Tech, Supply Chain or Logistics SaaS experience; early-stage startup experience (<50 employees) where you built processes from scratch.



Why join comstruct? 🛠️

Construction is one of the largest and least digitized industries in the world. We're building its digital future. Founded in March 2022, we've raised a €12.5M seed round from 20VC, Google Ventures and top European investors and nine of Switzerland's ten largest contractors already run on comstruct. That's the foundation. The category-defining company gets built now - together with you!



What we offer

 - Real ownership, twice over: Equity options on top of a competitive salary and the freedom to own your work and build things from the ground up, not execute someone else's plan.

 - Learn from the best: Direct mentoring from our Co-founder & CEO Henric Meinhardt, plus access to engineering mentors through our network with Google Ventures and 20VC.

 - Build at the frontier: Early access to the latest LLMs and SDKs

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer Intern
source_jobs.description:
Construction is one of the largest industries in the world, yet it is inefficient, wasteful, and incredibly complex. Rising cost pressure and increasing complexity are pushing the industry to its limits. At comstruct, we are on a mission to fundamentally change how construction companies operate and we are looking for people who want to build that future with us.

comstruct develops autonomous AI agents that reimagine the entire material procurement process, from requisition to posted invoice. Our platform takes over repetitive and error-prone tasks across the material flow, enabling construction companies to focus on what truly matters: building. Backed by a €12.5M funding round with investors such as Google Ventures and 20VC, we are now entering our next growth phase and are looking for exceptionally driven and ambitious individuals to help scale our product.

Trusted by some of the world’s largest construction companies (including Vinci), we are just getting started. To take our product to the next level, we are looking for full-time Product Engineer Interns who want to build meaningful solutions at the intersection of software, AI, and one of the most complex industries in the world.

🚀 What we are looking for:

 - Currently enrolled at one of the world’s top universities with an outstanding academic track record

 - You have already gained first experience through high-growth startups, ambitious student initiatives, research projects, venture capital, or a top-tier consultancy

 - You are extremely driven and can point to concrete achievements that demonstrate your ambition and execution power

 - You work in a highly structured way, think analytically, and take full ownership of your responsibilities

 - You are fully proficient in German and English

🚀 You have ownership to drive a new product initiatives like:

 - Procurement Agents to buy every material right from the construction site

 - Contract Management to give companies full insights in all the contracts

 - Your own idea: You have an idea on your own how we can 10x the value of our platform? Go for it!

📚 How are we setting you up for success:

 - A very clear path to success. You can turn the things you build from a feature to a team to a product line

 - A competitive salary and equity options, as we want you to be a fully committed part of our team

 - Mentorship from both experienced colleagues and external mentors, supporting you in turning ideas into reality and scaling them effectively

 - Direct access to our customer champions to iterate on and refine your product ideas

 - Top notch hardware, daily dinners in the office, learning and development budget, Wellpass subscriptions and yearly company off-sites & team events (the last ones were in Mallorca and Italy).

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION:

comstruct is building the agentic workforce for procurement in European construction. Our agents turn paper delivery notes, fragmented invoices and offline supplier decisions into structured, real-time data and live decisions, embedded inside the largest contractors in Europe and the US. To accelerate this journey, we secured a €12.5M seed financing round from 20VC and Google Ventures, along with top European investors.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Win mid-market accounts in Europe (deal size €25-40k, 100-2,000 FTE)

 - Own your territory end-to-end: from cold outreach to C-level close and long-term account growth

 - Drive deals at trade shows, fairs, and industry meetups

 - Collaborate with BDR, Marketing, Customer Success, and Product to accelerate your pipeline




WHAT YOU BRING:

 - 2+ years of experience as an Account Executive in a complex B2B SaaS environment

 - Excelled in your numbers and consistently ranked at the top of your team in a fast-paced startup environment (ideally Series A to C)

 - Picked up the phone and built pipeline from zero

 - Closed deals at €15-20k, (ideally in traditional industries like manufacturing, logistics, construction, trade)

 - Take ownership, are coachable and value feedback

 - Actively worked with MEDDPICC or similar

 - Fluent in German and English




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Salary: €120-160k OTE

 - An environment where you can achieve 150% target attainment and beyond

 - Career development (Sr./ Enterprise/ Leadership) opportunities in one Europe’s fastest growing startups

 - A high performance culture where every department delivers excellence

 - A market that is unsaturated and largely undigitized (still running on paper and Excel), which presents a great opportunity to win and lead the market

 - Direct mentorship from our Co-founder & CEO, Henric Meinhardt and Nicolas Pabst von Ohain (Head of Sales)

 - Regular feedback sessions with experienced mentors like Johann Butting (Vice President of Slack)

 - Perks:
   
   - Team offsites - our last two were in Mallorca and Italy. The next one is in Porto in August.
   
   - Free drinks, snacks, and daily optional dinners
   
   - Wellpass subscription
   
   - Voluntary pension contribution
   
   - Dog-friendly office

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to Nicolas https://de.linkedin.com/in/nicolas-pabst-von-ohain.

source_jobs.title: Customer Value Engineer
source_jobs.description:
comstruct turns the paper chaos of construction into structured data. We extract material data from delivery notes and invoices at item level and automate what construction companies still do by hand: documentation, invoice entry, reconciliation. We're looking for exceptional talent to help us empower the industry with smarter and more efficient solutions.

 

About the role 🦺

As our Customer Value Engineer you own our most valuable accounts once the rollout is done and make sure every customer gets maximum value out of our product.

Most of your time you're with customers: driving adoption across sites and teams, building ROI models and running strategic QBRs that prove monetary value to decision makers. You build lasting relationships from site managers to C-level, spot expansion opportunities into new business units and geographies and qualify them before Sales gets involved. Working closely with our Forward Deployed Engineering team, you bring customer feedback from the field directly into our product development.

You love owning accounts end-to-end and turning customer success into revenue? Then this role is for you!

 

What you will be building 🏗️

 - Own our most valuable accounts: Act as the main point of contact and trusted partner for our customers after rollout. You build relationships that turn one-off projects into long-term valuable and strategic partnerships.

 - Drive adoption on site: Onboard teams across construction sites and business units and make sure comstruct gets used as their everyday working tool.

 - Prove Value & ROI: Move the conversation from "simple features" to "concrete valuable outcomes." You build ROI models and lead strategic QBRs that prove the monetary value of our product to decision makers.

 - Expand your accounts: You view your accounts as a business that needs to grow. You identify expansion opportunities, build value cases and draft and negotiate contracts together with our AEs.

 - Shape the product from the field: You know best with what our customers struggle on site and you make sure our FDE and product team hears it. That feedback shapes what we build next.
   
    

What we're looking for ✨

 - You bring 1-3 years of experience in Customer Success, Account or Project Management, Consulting, managing complex accounts with multi-layered hierarchies. You have structured onboarding plans across multiple stakeholders and driven alignment and adoption across multiple branches.

 - You are deeply commercially minded. Discussing pricing and defending value comes naturally to you and you instinctively spot where an account can grow.

 - You don't need to code, but you can read and map an ERP integration, assess what's feasible and push back in a room full of engineers.

 - You are curious to dig deep into our product. You want to understand how things work under the hood and you naturally connect what customers need with what the product can do.

 - You are a natural communicator. People enjoy working with you, whether that's a site manager in a container office or a CFO in a boardroom.

 - You are willing to work five days a week from our Munich office with occasional customer travel

 - You speak German on a native level and are fluent in English.

Nice to have: Ideally, you have initial experience with Construction Tech, Supply Chain or Logistics SaaS experience; early-stage startup experience (<50 employees) where you built processes from scratch.

 

Why join comstruct? 🛠️

Construction is one of the largest and least digitized industries in the world. We're building its digital future. Founded in March 2022, we've raised a €12.5M seed round from 20VC, Google Ventures and top European investors and nine of Switzerland's ten largest contractors already run on comstruct. That's the foundation. The category-defining company gets built now - together with you!

 

What we offer

 - Real ownership, twice over: Equity options on top of a competitive salary and the freedom to own your

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION:

comstruct is building the agentic workforce for procurement in European construction. Our agents turn paper delivery notes, fragmented invoices and offline supplier decisions into structured, real-time data and live decisions, embedded inside the largest contractors in Europe and the US. To accelerate this journey, we secured a €12.5M seed financing round from 20VC and Google Ventures, along with top European investors.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Close contracts for enterprise accounts in Europe (deal size €100k-1M, 2,000+ FTE)

 - Own your territory: land the biggest construction companies in Europe and expand accounts from local to global

 - Work closely with BDR, Marketing, Customer Success, and Product to win enterprise deals and make sure the product fits your customers




WHAT YOU BRING:

 - 4+ years of experience as an Account Executive in an enterprise B2B SaaS environment

 - Closed SaaS deals at €100k+ (ideally in traditional industries like manufacturing, logistics, construction, trade)

 - Excelled in your numbers and consistently ranked at the top of your team in a fast-paced startup environment (ideally Seed to Series C)

 - Take ownership, are coachable, value feedback

 - Fluent in German and English




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Salary: €160-220k OTE

 - Take over an existing book of business with the largest construction companies in Europe

 - A high performance culture where every department delivers excellence

 - A market that is unsaturated and largely undigitized (still running on paper and Excel), which presents a great opportunity to win and lead the market

 - Regular feedback sessions with experienced mentors like Johann Butting (Vice President of Slack)

 - Perks:
   
   - Team offsites - our last two were in Mallorca and Italy. The next one is in Porto in August.
   
   - Free drinks, snacks, and daily optional dinners
   
   - Wellpass subscription
   
   - Voluntary pension contribution
   
   - Dog-friendly office

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to Nicolas https://de.linkedin.com/in/nicolas-pabst-von-ohain.

source_jobs.title: Head of Customer Experience
source_jobs.description:
comstruct turns the paper chaos of construction into structured data. We extract material data from delivery notes and invoices at item level and automate what construction companies still do by hand: documentation, invoice entry, reconciliation. We're looking for exceptional talent to help us empower the industry with smarter and more efficient solutions.

 

About the role 🦺

As our Head of Customer Experience you own the entire post-sales journey of our customers. You lead a team that covers everything from Solution Engineering and POV Implementation through Rollout and Adoption to Expansion and Support. Your mission: flawless rollouts and a customer experience that makes comstruct the operating system of every construction site.

 

What you will be building 🏗️

 - Build and lead the CX org: You hire, develop and coach the team across the entire customer experience journey. From scoping ERP architectures in Solution Engineering to resolving requests in Support. You set the structure, the standards and the pace.

 - Make technical rollouts a machine: POVs, supplier integrations, on-site onboardings and multi-site rollouts - you turn what's currently craftsmanship into a scalable system that gets customers to value in weeks, not quarters.

 - Own the post-sales P&L: You tie customer health to ARR, run strategic QBRs with enterprise decision makers and build the engine that surfaces qualified expansion signals before Sales ever gets involved.

 - Shape the product from the field: You sit in Engineering and Product sprint meetings, drive roadmap prioritization from customer signals and make sure what gets built is what moves accounts forward.
   
    

What we're looking for ✨

 - You bring 4-6 years of experience in Solution Engineering, Implementation, Value Engineering or Customer Success in enterprise or mid-market environments. Structuring POV execution and scoping complex technical implementations across multiple stakeholders is your core, not a secondary skill.

 - You have led a team for at least 1-2 years, hiring and developing ICs, in an environment where the playbook didn't exist until you wrote it.

 - You don't need to code, but you can read and map an ERP integration, assess what's feasible and push back in a room full of engineers.

 - You are eager to learn the product from scratch and understand it inside out. You drive roadmap prioritization from the field and connect customer feedback to what actually gets built.

 - You have carried commercial ownership in a previous implementation or GTM role. You've qualified upsell, defended pricing and driven expansion.

 - You handle multi-layered enterprise accounts, tough stakeholder conversations and direct feedback without losing composure.

 - You speak German on a native level and are fluent in English.

Nice to have: Construction Tech, Supply Chain or Logistics SaaS experience; hands-on building of features or integrations; early-stage startup experience (<50 employees) where you built processes from scratch.

 

Why join comstruct? 🛠️

Construction is one of the largest and least digitized industries in the world. We're building its digital future. Founded in March 2022, we've raised a €12.5M seed round from 20VC, Google Ventures and top European investors and nine of Switzerland's ten largest contractors already run on comstruct. That's the foundation. The category-defining company gets built now - together with you!

 

What we offer

 - Real ownership, twice over: Equity options on top of a competitive salary and the freedom to own your work and build things from the ground up, not execute someone else's plan.

 - Learn from the best: Direct mentoring from our Co-founder & CEO Henric Meinhardt, plus access to engineering mentors through our network with Google Ventures and 20VC.

 - Build at the frontier: Early access to the latest LLMs and SDKs, any AI productivity tools you need and top-notch hardware.

 - Invest in yourself: A dedicated development budget

notes: comstruct is a construction procurement platform with a mix of tech and non-tech roles
